message:
Round 14: FnvHash implementation (117ms gain!)

Results: 751ms → 634ms (15.6% improvement)
Gap to rs-bpe: 158ms → 31ms (5% slower)

Exceeded expectations:
- Expected: 20-40ms gain
- Actual: 117ms gain (2.9x better!)

Changes:
- Created fnv_hash.zig (FnvHashContext with string optimization)
- Migrated all HashMaps to FnvHash (vocab, pair_lookup, split_table)
- Unrolled loop for short strings (≤8 bytes)

Total progress: 3.4s → 634ms (5.4x faster!)
Within striking distance: 31ms gap (1.05x slower than rs-bpe)
